title: Secluded Waterfall Cascading Into Moss Covered Pool
sourceTitle: Secluded Waterfall Cascading Into Moss Covered Pool
prompt: A secluded waterfall cascading into a moss-covered pool deep within a temperate rainforest. Mist hangs heavy in the air, obscuring the surrounding foliage. Rendered in a monochromatic palette of blues and greens with a hint of orange, with subtle shifts in tone to suggest depth and texture.
